functions.author: Kael'Vorr
functions.title: The Watching Infection
pages:
The Watching Infection

A record of the Eye Abomination and the hive mind behind it.

Origin

The infection came from a world consumed by one living intelligence. Nothing there was alone because nothing remained separate.

Kael'Vorr's Interest

He wondered whether a hive mind could understand individuality by consuming a world full of individuals.

The Eye

The Eye Abomination is a sensory organ grown far beyond its original purpose. It watches for the hive, attacks for the hive, and dies as the hive.

Adaptation

Infected tissue studies damage. Surviving samples change, which is why infected materials feel disturbingly responsive in the hand.

Infected Goo

Goo binds organic and mineral material. It is used with Infected Eyes, crystals, tablets, and iron equipment.

Infected Crystal

The crystal stores adaptation in a rigid form. Nine crystals craft an Infected Tablet.

Infected Tablet

The tablet stabilizes infection long enough to shape armor, an Infected Sword, or an Infected Axe.

Infected Gear

Combine iron gear with the tablet, Infected Goo, and Infected Eyes. The result keeps learning after it is equipped.

Abomination Eye

The rare preserved eye is concentrated perception. More eyes may drop from luckier kills.

Flesh Connection

Flesh Pods are not part of the hive, but the infection attempts to recruit them. The result is growth that watches back.

Chaos Weapons

Kael'Vorr combines adaptive crystal with demon steel, living flesh, Corrupted XP, echo energy, and ancient fragments.

Why It Works

These materials should reject one another. Kael'Vorr considers forced coexistence the invention.

Field Advice

Break line of sight, destroy supporting growth, and never leave samples where roots can reach them.

Kael'Vorr's Note

It sees through a thousand eyes and still cannot imagine surprise. Let us teach it.
